recommended_drugs: Tamoxifen (HR+ cohorts) or Anastrozole / Letrozole (Aromatase Inhibitors for postmenopausal profiles) + Trastuzumab if HER2 overexpression is documented.
scientific_source: SEOM Clinical Guidelines for Early Stage Breast Cancer / ASCO Biomarker Profiling (2026 Updates)
recommended_foods:
- **Cruciferous Vegetables:** Broccoli, cauliflower, Brussels sprouts, and kale (rich in indole-3-carbinol and sulforaphane to support metabolic clearance pathways).
- **Healthy Fats & Omega-3s:** Extra virgin olive oil, avocados, walnuts, chia seeds, and wild-caught salmon (reduces circulating inflammatory markers).
- **High-Fiber Complex Carbohydrates:** Whole grains (oats, quinoa, brown rice) and legumes to optimize gut microbiota profiles and regulate estrogen reabsorption.
- **Antioxidant-Rich Fruits:** Blueberries, blackberries, raspberries, and pomegranates (packed with bioactive polyphenols).
restricted_foods:
- **Refined Sugars & Ultra-Processed Sweets:** High-glycemic items that can alter insulin-like growth factor (IGF-1) receptor pathways.
- **Industrial Trans Fats & Fried Foods:** Commercial baked goods and hydrogenated lipids that promote systemic low-grade inflammation.
- **Alcoholic Beverages:** Strictly restricted due to clear metabolic pathways elevating circulating estrogen expressions.
- **Undercooked or Charred Meats:** High-temperature grilled meats containing structural heterocyclic amines.
three_day_nutrition_plan:
### 🥦 Personalized 3-Day Nutrition Blueprint

**DAY 1:**
- *Breakfast:* Oatmeal cooked in unsweetened almond milk, topped with fresh blueberries and crushed walnuts.
- *Lunch:* Grilled wild salmon served over a bed of quinoa and steamed broccoli seasoned with extra virgin olive oil.
- *Snack:* Sliced green apple with one tablespoon of pure almond butter.
- *Dinner:* Organic turkey breast stir-fry with mixed bell peppers, zucchini, and spinach over wild rice.

**DAY 2:**
- *Breakfast:* Chia seed pudding made with coconut milk, layered with fresh raspberries and pumpkin seeds.
- *Lunch:* Lentil and vegetable soup accompanied by a side salad of kale and avocado chunks.
- *Snack:* A cup of green tea and a handful of raw pumpkin seeds.
- *Dinner:* Baked cod fillet with a light garlic-herb crust, roasted sweet potato wedges, and asparagus spears.

**DAY 3:**
- *Breakfast:* Scrambled egg whites with baby spinach and sliced tomatoes on whole-grain sourdough toast.
- *Lunch:* Mediterranean chickpea salad with cucumbers, cherry tomatoes, parsley, kalamata olives, and fresh lemon-olive oil dressing.
- *Snack:* Plain Greek yogurt (unsweetened) topped with a dash of Ceylon cinnamon and ground flaxseeds.
- *Dinner:* Lemon-herb roasted chicken breast served with sautéed Brussels sprouts and a small baked golden potato.
three_day_workout_routine:
### 🏋️ Progressive Strength Staging Split

**SESSION 1 (Upper Body Structural Push/Pull):**
- Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press: 3 sets x 12 repetitions (Focusing on shoulder stabilization post-biopsy).
- Chest-Supported Rows: 3 sets x 10 repetitions (Reinforces spinal posture and scapular retraction).
- Incline Dumbbell Chest Press: 2 sets x 12 repetitions (Light, controlled pectoral ranges).
- Core Activation: Deadbugs (2 sets x 10 controlled alternating repetitions).

**SESSION 2 (Lower Body Functional Kinetic Chain):**
- Dumbbell Goblet Squats: 3 sets x 12 repetitions (Ensures fundamental motor units preservation).
- Romanian Deadlifts with light dumbbells: 3 sets x 10 repetitions (Targeting posterior hamstrings and gluteals).
- Standing Calf Raises: 2 sets x 15 repetitions (Enhances peripheral vascular return to combat edema).
- Core Activation: Bird-Dog (2 sets x 12 total repetitions, holding for 2 seconds at peak extension).

**SESSION 3 (Full Body Metabolic & Flexibility Preservation):**
- Supported Dumbbell Lunges: 2 sets x 10 repetitions per leg (Improves unilateral hip balance).
- Lat Pulldowns (Wide grip, light load): 3 sets x 12 repetitions (Maintains glenohumeral mobility indices).
- Dumbbell Bicep Curls to Overhead Press combo: 2 sets x 10 repetitions (Functional movement vectors).
- Standing Pallof Press: 2 sets x 12 repetitions per side (Anti-rotational abdominal stability).

recommended_drugs: FOLFOX Regimen (Fluorouracil + Oxaliplatin) or FOLFIRI depending on microsatellite instability (MSI/dMMR) profiling markers.
scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Gastrointestinal Carcinomas v2.2026 / ESMO Low-Residue Standards
recommended_foods:
- **Low-Residue Soluble Fiber:** Carrots, skinless zucchini, pumpkin, and butternut squash (easy on intestinal mucosal linings).
- **Lean Amino Acids:** Skinless chicken breast, pasteurized egg whites, and wild white fish (hake, cod, sole).
- **Probiotic Food Vectors:** Non-dairy fermented oat kefirs or plain unsweetened yogurts to repair mucosal linings.
restricted_foods:
- **Coarse Insoluble Fiber:** Raw seeds, tough hulls, unpeeled whole raw fruits, and stringy vegetables during acute therapy blocks.
- **Irritating Gastric Elements:** Spicy condiments, hot chili oils, carbonated beverages, and caffeinated arrays.
- **Red and Processed Meats:** Industrial sausages, charcuterie, and heavily marbled cuts that contain high structural nitrites.

scientific_source: NCCN Guidelines for Thoracic Malignancies v3.2026 / American Lung Association Nutritional Directives
recommended_foods:
- **Cruciferous Isothiocyanates:** Watercress, radishes, arugula, and steamed white cabbage.
- **High-Density Healthy Lipids:** Cold-pressed avocado oil, macadamia nuts, and wild sardines (delivers rich calorie-to-volume metrics).
- **Vitamin D & Selenium Boosters:** Free-range organic egg yolks and brown crimini mushrooms.
restricted_foods:
- **Mucus-Promoting Simple Sugars:** High-fructose corn syrups, processed dairy creams, and commercial pastries.
- **Excessive Simple Carbohydrates:** Refined baking flours that elevate the respiratory quotient ($RQ$) and induce dyspnea.
- **Nitrate-Preserved Foods:** Smoked bacon, jerkies, and commercial chemical-canned cold cuts.

- Incline Dumbbell Chest Press: 2 sets x 12 repetitions (Light, controlled pectoral ranges).
- Core Activation: Deadbugs (2 sets x 10 controlled alternating repetitions).

**SESSION 2 (Lower Body Functional Kinetic Chain):**
- Dumbbell Goblet Squats: 3 sets x 12 repetitions (Ensures fundamental motor units preservation).
- Romanian Deadlifts with light dumbbells: 3 sets x 10 repetitions (Targeting posterior hamstrings and gluteals).
- Standing Calf Raises: 2 sets x 15 repetitions (Enhances peripheral vascular return to combat edema).
- Core Activation: Bird-Dog (2 sets x 12 total repetitions, holding for 2 seconds at peak extension).

**SESSION 3 (Full Body Metabolic & Flexibility Preservation):**
- Supported Dumbbell Lunges: 2 sets x 10 repetitions per leg (Improves unilateral hip balance).
- Lat Pulldowns (Wide grip, light load): 3 sets x 12 repetitions (Maintains glenohumeral mobility indices).
- Dumbbell Bicep Curls to Overhead Press combo: 2 sets x 10 repetitions (Functional movement vectors).
- Standing Pallof Press: 2 sets x 12 repetitions per side (Anti-rotational abdominal stability).

recommended_drugs: Standard First-Line Targeted Systemic Immunotherapies (Pembrolizumab / Nivolumab) or hormone blockade line arrays.
scientific_source: ASCO / ESMO Consensus Principles on Integrative Care / ACSM Exercise Guidelines (2026 Updates)
recommended_foods:
- **Broad-Spectrum Phytochemicals:** Mixed dark leafy greens (spinach, chard) and sulfur-rich alliums (fresh garlic, scallions, onions).
- **Anti-inflammatory Lipids:** Cold-extracted extra virgin olive oil, ground flaxseeds, and hemp hearts.
- **Clean Cellular Hydration:** Purified mineral water, fresh ginger root infusions, and polyphenol-dense green tea extracts.
restricted_foods:
- **Refined Sugar Molecules:** Granulated sugars, commercial sodas, energy drinks, and packaged pasteurized juices.
- **Oxidized Hydrogenated Oils:** Industrial margarines, palm-derived baking vegetable oils, and commercial deep-fried items.
- **Cured and Chemical-Preserved Proteins:** Meats exhibiting structural char marks or treated with sodium nitrates.
three_day_nutrition_plan:
### 🥦 Personalized 3-Day Nutrition Blueprint

**DAY 1:**
- *Breakfast:* Oatmeal cooked in unsweetened almond milk, topped with fresh blueberries and crushed walnuts.
- *Lunch:* Grilled wild salmon served over a bed of quinoa and steamed broccoli seasoned with extra virgin olive oil.
- *Snack:* Sliced green apple with one tablespoon of pure almond butter.
- *Dinner:* Organic turkey breast stir-fry with mixed bell peppers, zucchini, and spinach over wild rice.

**DAY 2:**
- *Breakfast:* Chia seed pudding made with coconut milk, layered with fresh raspberries and pumpkin seeds.
- *Lunch:* Lentil and vegetable soup accompanied by a side salad of kale and avocado chunks.
- *Snack:* A cup of green tea and a handful of raw pumpkin seeds.
- *Dinner:* Baked cod fillet with a light garlic-herb crust, roasted sweet potato wedges, and asparagus spears.

**DAY 3:**
- *Breakfast:* Scrambled egg whites with baby spinach and sliced tomatoes on whole-grain sourdough toast.
- *Lunch:* Mediterranean chickpea salad with cucumbers, cherry tomatoes, parsley, kalamata olives, and fresh lemon-olive oil dressing.
- *Snack:* Plain Greek yogurt (unsweetened) topped with a dash of Ceylon cinnamon and ground flaxseeds.
- *Dinner:* Lemon-herb roasted chicken breast served with sautéed Brussels sprouts and a small baked golden potato.
